annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under A.R.S. § 44-1201(A), & — 7.75% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Arizona’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Current formula value as of 2026-07-08; verify at azleg.gov. Not legal advice.
